channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-ESPN star Keith Olbermann blasts Pat McAfee over Canada remarks, calls on network to fire him
item.description: Former ESPN broadcaster Keith Olbermann called on his former employer to fire Pat McAfee over his remarks about Canada. McAfee blasted Canadians for booing the U.S. anthem.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Lakers and LeBron are clearly reveling in what the Luka trade did for their title hopes
item.description: The game hasn’t gotten easy for the Los Angeles Lakers since the trade deadline. It just looks that way.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brewers boost rotation depth by adding veteran lefty Jose Quintana, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the negotiations says veteran left-handed pitcher Jose Quintana is joining the Milwaukee Brewers on a one-year, $4.25 million deal with $1 million in potential bonuses.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Filipowski scores 25, but Jazz lose to Detroit, 134-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cade Cunningham had 29 points, nine assists and four steals, and the Detroit Pistons beat the Utah Jazz 134-106 on Monday night for their 10th win in 11 games. The Jazz committed 27 turnovers end a season-long nine-gam homestand with a record of 3-6.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg stars once more in his possible farewell at Cameron Indoor Stadium
item.description: Duke freshman standout Cooper Flagg delivered one more stellar performance in what may have been his final game at Cameron Indoor Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander making 50-point games a regular occurrence for the West-leading Thunder
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's putback basket in the fourth quarter put him over 50 points and sent the Oklahoma City crowd into a frenzy. The Thunder star responded by jogging downcourt expressionless, as if it were no big deal. That’s because it has become almost routine for him.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cryer scores 22 points and No. 3 Houston beats Kansas 65-59 for 9th straight win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — L.J. Cryer scored 22 points and No. 3 Houston won its ninth straight game with a 65-59 victory over Kansas on Monday night. Emanuel Sharp added 12 points off the bench, including two free throws that pushed Houston's lead to 63-59 with 20 seconds left.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mavs' Kyrie Irving suffers left knee sprain, shoots free throws before leaving game
item.description: KKyrie Irving suffered a left knee sprain and shot free throws for the Mavericks before leaving the floor in obvious pain late in the first quarter of Dallas' 122-98 loss to the Sacramento Kings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: WWE to launch new podcasts as part of expanded partnership with Fanatics
item.description: WWE will launch new podcasts as part of its expanded partnership with Fanatics ahead of WrestleMania 41, Fox News Digital learned on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Katherine Legge to be the 1st woman in 7 years to compete in NASCAR Cup Series race
item.description: Katherine Legge will become the first woman in a NASCAR Cup Series race since Danica Patrick in 2018 when the veteran makes her debut Sunday at Phoenix Raceway.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Commanders acquire wide receiver Deebo Samuel in a trade with the 49ers, AP source says
item.description: The Washington Commanders have acquired wide receiver Deebo Samuel from the San Francisco 49ers for a fifth-round pick, pending a physical, according to a person with knowledge of the trade.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida Man Games return for Round 2 as teams vie to be the world’s worst superhero
item.description: The Florida Man Games are back for Round 2, as teams from around the state gather to prove they have what it takes to join the ranks of the world’s worst superhero.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Maine lawmaker censured for posting picture of trans student on Facebook
item.description: (NewsNation) — A state representative in Maine was censured by other members of the legislature after posting a picture of a trans teen girl on her public Facebook page. The resolution passed 75-70 in a party-line vote, the Portland Press-Herald reported. Per Maine House rules, Republican Rep.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
